description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian figure dressed in a knee-length, V-neck dress with a floral pattern. The dress has three-quarter sleeves and a slightly flared skirt, giving it a casual yet elegant appearance suitable for urban environments. The figure has a short, side-parted hairstyle and is wearing pointed high-heeled shoes. The arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and the facial features are neutral. The overall build is average, and the figure is proportioned realistically for an adult woman. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult woman in a floral-patterned, knee-length dress with three-quarter sleeves, short hair, and high-heeled shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neckline, floral dress, and pointed high heels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dress's length, sleeve, and shoe profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the dress's fit and shoe.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length V-neck dress with three-quarter sleeves and a flared skirt
